description: Inline style modifier that automatically fades out a shape after a delay. Placed inside a shape expression. Useful for temporary markers and annotations.
utility: Add auto-fade-out behavior to a shape after a configurable delay

arguments.name: delay
arguments.description: Seconds to wait before fading starts. Defaults to 5 if omitted. Use 0 to disable auto-fade (shape stays visible).

arguments.name: duration
arguments.description: Fade animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.5.

alternates.description: Fade out after 5 seconds with 0.5 second fade animation
Fade out after 3 seconds with 1 second fade animation
Disable auto-fade-out, shape stays visible permanently
Annotation that fades out after 2 seconds

examples.scenario: Label with auto fade-out after 3 seconds
